topic: Why your fastest morning runs aren't your best workouts
caption: Did you know your fastest morning runs might not be your best workouts? 🏃‍♀️ Here are 5 reasons why: 1) Lack of warm-up, 2) Dehydration, 3) Low blood sugar, 4) Increased injury risk, and 5) Neglecting strength training. 💪 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🏋️‍♀️👍
